wine_tours.name: Ruedesheim Cable Car to the Niederwald Monument
wine_tours.description: Six-minute cable-car ride from central Ruedesheim over the Riesling vines to the Niederwald Monument with its 12-metre Germania statue. Combined Ring Tour ticket adds the chairlift down to Assmannshausen.
wine_tours.price_range: Return ticket from around EUR 11 per person; Ring Tour priced higher

wine_tours.name: Asbach Visitor Centre Brandy Tour
wine_tours.address: Ingelheimer Strasse 4, 65385 Ruedesheim am Rhein, Germany
wine_tours.description: One-hour guided tour of the Asbach Visitor Centre in Ruedesheim explaining the brand's brandy-making process, with film and a tasting of two brandies and one liqueur. Saturdays at 10:00 plus a monthly Friday slot.
tour_types: Guided tour with brandy and liqueur tasting

wine_tours.name: Kloster Eberbach Guided Tour
wine_tours.address: Kloster Eberbach, 65346 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
wine_tours.description: Guided tour of the 1136 Cistercian monastery in the Rheingau hinterland with cloisters, lay-brother dormitory and the Lay Brothers' Refectory. Optional Vinothek tasting flight of Hessische Staatsweinguter Riesling.
tour_types: Themed scheduled tour with wine tasting
wine_tours.price_range: Monastery tour with tasting from low double-digit EUR per person

wine_tours.name: KD Rhine Cruise Ruedesheim
wine_tours.description: Scheduled passenger cruises by Koeln-Duesseldorfer between Cologne and Mainz, with Ruedesheim as the gateway for the UNESCO Upper Middle Rhine Valley through Loreley. Day-cruise wine and snack service on board.
tour_types: Scheduled day cruise Ruedesheim to Koblenz
wine_tours.price_range: Day-cruise tickets from around EUR 30 per person

wine_tours.name: Rheingau Riesling Rad e-Bike Wine Tour
wine_tours.description: E-bike rentals and tour planning from the central Ruedesheim depot, with around 60 e-bikes and over 200 touring bikes. Rentals delivered along the Rheingau wine route from Ruedesheim to Eltville and Lorch.
tour_types: Self-guided e-bike day along the Rheingau wine route
Multi-day rental with delivery to hotel
Guided themed tours with picnic packs
wine_tours.price_range: E-bike day hire from around EUR 35 per person

wine_tours.name: WINEAROUND Ruedesheim Self-Guided Tasting
wine_tours.description: Self-guided seven-station wine walk through historic Ruedesheim with four WINECOINS redeemable at partner wineries and vinotheks. Booked through the Rheingau-Taunus Kultur and Tourismus office.
wine_tours.price_range: Around EUR 19.50 per person for four wine coins

wine_tours.name: Paddle Steamer Goethe Nostalgia Route
wine_tours.description: Restored 1913 paddle steamer Goethe sails the daily Nostalgia Route between Koblenz and Ruedesheim through the UNESCO Upper Middle Rhine Valley, with onboard dining and Rheingau wines. Late-April to early October.
tour_types: Day cruise Koblenz to Ruedesheim and return
wine_tours.price_range: Day cruise from around EUR 60 per person

wine_tours.name: Grape Escapes Germany Rheingau Riesling Tour
wine_tours.description: Tailor-made private Rheingau Riesling tour from Frankfurt, Mainz or Heidelberg with vineyard visits, lunches and tastings booked by Grape Escapes Germany, a Mainz-based small-group operator.

wine_tours.name: Winekeller Rheingau Icons Day Tour
wine_tours.description: Private Rheingau icons day tour by Winekeller from Frankfurt visiting Schloss Vollrads, Schloss Johannisberg and Kloster Eberbach with cellar visits and tastings of estate Rieslings.
tour_types: Private icons day tour with three estate visits
wine_tours.price_range: Private day tour priced on request
